title: Hill chart — per-scope status for a Shape-Up pitch
description: Tracks each scope of a pitch through the uphill (figuring out unknowns) → downhill (mechanical execution) → done lifecycle. Updated during a cycle by /hill <scope> <up|down|done>.

pitch_id.description: Matches pitch_id in pitch.md frontmatter, e.g. 0001-shape-up-support.

cycle.description: Cycle identifier, e.g. 01, 02. Same value as pitch.md frontmatter cycle field once bet.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent update.

id.description: Scope identifier from pitch.md, e.g. S1, S2.

name.description: Short scope name. Matches the heading under '## Scopes' in pitch.md.

status.description: uphill: figuring out unknowns. downhill: mechanical execution. done: scope complete and verified.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last status change for this scope.

note.description: Optional one-liner about the most recent transition.

scopes.name: Templates and validator
scopes.note: Frontmatter schema decided; validator in progress.
